policies.title: Information Security Policy
policies.description: Defines the organization's overall information security program, governance expectations, control responsibilities, and security objectives.
policies.aiSummary: This policy anchors the SOC 2 control environment by defining security governance, accountability, and high-level control expectations.

policies.title: Access Control Policy
policies.description: Establishes requirements for granting, reviewing, modifying, and removing logical and physical access.
policies.aiSummary: This policy supports access governance by requiring approval, least privilege, periodic review, and timely removal of access.

policies.title: Password Policy
policies.description: Defines password and authentication requirements for user, privileged, and service accounts.
policies.aiSummary: This policy reduces credential compromise risk by defining password and account authentication expectations.

policies.title: Multi-Factor Authentication Policy
policies.description: Defines where MFA is required and how MFA exceptions are approved, reviewed, and monitored.
policies.aiSummary: This policy supports SOC 2 access security by requiring stronger authentication for sensitive and remote access.

policies.title: Acceptable Use Policy
policies.description: Defines acceptable use requirements for company systems, devices, networks, data, and communication tools.
policies.aiSummary: This policy communicates expected employee behavior and supports consistent enforcement of security rules.

policies.title: Asset Management Policy
policies.description: Defines requirements for identifying, classifying, owning, maintaining, and retiring information assets.
policies.aiSummary: This policy helps ensure assets are known, owned, protected, and included in monitoring and control activities.

policies.title: Backup Policy
policies.description: Defines backup requirements for systems and data, including frequency, monitoring, retention, and restoration testing.
policies.aiSummary: This policy supports resilience by requiring backups to be performed, monitored, retained, and tested.

policies.title: Disaster Recovery Policy
policies.description: Defines disaster recovery planning, recovery objectives, testing, and improvement requirements.
policies.aiSummary: This policy supports recovery readiness by defining how critical services are restored after major disruptions.

policies.title: Business Continuity Policy
policies.description: Defines business continuity planning, continuity roles, exercise requirements, and disruption response expectations.
policies.aiSummary: This policy supports continuity of operations by requiring planning and periodic validation for business disruptions.

policies.title: Incident Response Policy
policies.description: Defines how security incidents are identified, escalated, investigated, contained, remediated, and reviewed.
policies.aiSummary: This policy supports incident readiness by defining response ownership, escalation, investigation, and lessons learned.

policies.title: Change Management Policy
policies.description: Defines requirements for requesting, approving, testing, deploying, and reviewing system changes.
policies.aiSummary: This policy supports controlled production change by requiring authorization, testing, traceability, and review.

policies.title: Vendor Management Policy
policies.description: Defines requirements for vendor due diligence, risk assessment, contract review, monitoring, and periodic reassessment.
policies.aiSummary: This policy supports third-party risk management by requiring vendor evaluation before and during vendor relationships.

policies.title: Data Classification Policy
policies.description: Defines data classification levels and handling expectations based on sensitivity and business impact.
policies.aiSummary: This policy helps protect sensitive data by defining classification and handling requirements.

policies.title: Encryption Policy
policies.description: Defines encryption requirements for data at rest, data in transit, backups, and cryptographic key handling.
policies.aiSummary: This policy supports confidentiality and data protection by defining when and how encryption must be used.

policies.title: Logging and Monitoring Policy
policies.description: Defines logging, monitoring, alerting, review, retention, and escalation requirements.
policies.aiSummary: This policy supports detection and investigation by requiring logs and alerts to be retained, reviewed, and protected.

policies.title: Secure Development Policy
policies.description: Defines secure software development lifecycle requirements, including review, testing, dependency management, and release controls.
policies.aiSummary: This policy supports secure application delivery by embedding security review and testing into engineering workflows.

policies.title: Remote Work Policy
policies.description: Defines security expectations for remote work, remote access, endpoint protection, and secure handling of company data.
policies.aiSummary: This policy supports secure remote operations by defining access, endpoint, and data handling expectations.

policies.title: Employee Onboarding Policy
policies.description: Defines onboarding security requirements including training, policy acknowledgement, role assignment, and access approval.
policies.aiSummary: This policy supports consistent onboarding by requiring security training, policy acknowledgement, and approved access.

policies.title: Employee Offboarding Policy
policies.description: Defines offboarding requirements for access removal, asset return, knowledge transfer, and termination processing.
policies.aiSummary: This policy reduces post-employment access risk by requiring timely deprovisioning and offboarding verification.

policies.title: Risk Management Policy
policies.description: Defines the risk management process for identifying, assessing, treating, monitoring, and reporting risks.
policies.aiSummary: This policy supports SOC 2 risk assessment by defining how risks are identified, evaluated, treated, and monitored.
